description: Loaded film cassette, edge-on exploded cutaway: light-tight shell outline, low-absorption front face, 0.005in front lead screen, double-emulsion film, 0.010in back lead screen, felt+spring pressure backing. Photon streaks pour through (~1% captured starburst on the film), then both foils glow cyan with electron clawback and brightened thickness tags. Title-panel ambient: scan sweep loops, ping re-fires as the line crosses the capture point.
